text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 230 

PARTIAL_FLAG 

LABEL: Part D Segment Partial County Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates that the Part D plan benefit package (segment) covers only a portion of the county. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PARTIAL_FLAG 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Blank = Plan benefit package segment covers the whole county or does not vary by segment. 
Y = Plan
